title: ServerStatus
description: Current operational status and resource utilization metrics for a SAP ASE server.

uptime.description: Server uptime in seconds since last restart.

activeConnections.description: Number of currently active user connections.

maxConnections.description: Maximum number of configured user connections.

totalMemoryMB.description: Total memory allocated to the server in megabytes.

timestamp.description: Timestamp when the status was captured.
